message:
feat(agent): add Canonical() method for centralized agent type normalization

Introduce AgentType.Canonical() that normalizes aliases (cc, claude,
claude-code, claude_code → AgentTypeClaudeCode; cod, codex, codex-cli,
openai, openai-codex → AgentTypeCodex; etc.) and whitespace/case drift
into canonical short forms. This eliminates the need for every consumer
to maintain its own switch-case mapping.

- Canonical() handles all known agent types including cursor, windsurf,
  aider, ollama, and user, plus trimming and lowercasing
- DisplayName(), ProfileName(), IsValid(), and NeedsDoubleEnter() now
  route through Canonical() so aliases work everywhere
- ParseWithHint canonicalizes the hint before using it, preventing
  mis-dispatch when tmux metadata contains format variants like " CodEx "
- Tests cover alias normalization, canonical round-trips, display names
  for alias inputs, and IsValid for aliased forms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,6 +46,8 @@ func TestAgentType_DisplayName(t *testing.T) {
 		{AgentTypeWindsurf, "Windsurf"},
 		{AgentTypeAider, "Aider"},
 		{AgentTypeUser, "User"},
+		{AgentType("codex"), "Codex CLI"},
+		{AgentType(" gemini "), "Gemini CLI"},
 		{AgentTypeUnknown, "Unknown"},
 		{AgentType("anything-else"), "Unknown"},
 	}
@@ -57,6 +59,38 @@ func TestAgentType_DisplayName(t *testing.T) {
 	}
 }
 
+func TestAgentType_Canonical(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Parallel()
+
+	tests := []struct {
+		at   AgentType
+		want AgentType
+	}{
+		{AgentTypeClaudeCode, AgentTypeClaudeCode},
+		{AgentType("claude"), AgentTypeClaudeCode},
+		{AgentType(" Claude-Code "), AgentTypeClaudeCode},
+		{AgentType("claude_code"), AgentTypeClaudeCode},
+		{AgentType("codex"), AgentTypeCodex},
+		{AgentType("codex-cli"), AgentTypeCodex},
+		{AgentType("openai"), AgentTypeCodex},
+		{AgentType("openai-codex"), AgentTypeCodex},
+		{AgentType(" GMI "), AgentTypeGemini},
+		{AgentType("google"), AgentTypeGemini},
+		{AgentType("gemini_cli"), AgentTypeGemini},
+		{AgentType("google-gemini"), AgentTypeGemini},
+		{AgentType("ws"), AgentTypeWindsurf},
+		{AgentType("unknown"), AgentTypeUnknown},
+		{AgentType(" custom "), AgentType("custom")},
+		{AgentType(""), AgentType("")},
+	}
+
+	for _, tt := range tests {
+		if got := tt.at.Canonical(); got != tt.want {
+			t.Errorf("AgentType(%q).Canonical() = %q, want %q", tt.at, got, tt.want)
+		}
+	}
+}
+
